name: Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bananas into the pie shell.
2. Prepare the pie filling according to package directions, using 2½ cups of cold milk.
3. Fold in half a cup of the whipped topping and pour over the banana slices in the shell.
4. Chill for at least 3 hours.
5. Top with the remaining whipped topping; garnish with banana slices and mint, if desired.
